ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the theme of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the product is available */,
  "inventory_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Threshold level to trigger a reorder */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit for unique identification */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is active in the inventory */,
  "online_channel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the online channel where the product is available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_online_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("online_channel_id") REFERENCES online_channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_theme_id FOREIGN KEY ("theme_id") REFERENCES themes ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "themes" (
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theme */,
  "theme_name" TEXT /* Name of the theme */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the theme */,
  "parent_theme_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent theme (for hierarchical themes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_themes_parent_theme_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_theme_id") REFERENCES themes ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "order_history" TEXT /* JSON or text field to store order history */,
  "rating" REAL /* Supplier rating based on performance */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the supplier is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the store */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the store */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the store */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store manager */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the store */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the store is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., store manager, inventory clerk, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store the user is associated with (for store managers and inventory clerks) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "online_channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each online channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the online channel */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the online channel */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the online channel */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the online channel */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the online channel is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)
